query: I have an urban mystery novel, about 50,000 characters, want to make it into a portrait short video for Douyin, help me set it up from scratch
Continue, characters should have been extracted, what's next

My project my_novel_01 that I started halfway, help me check where the progress is at

A few character faces are wrong in Episode 3's storyboards, help me individually regenerate E3S02 and E3S05

Help me add an intro and outro to the final video

Database migration failed, alembic upgrade head execution failed
